subject: [PATCH v2 10/28] nfs_common: add new NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds new NOTIFY4_* flags to the NFSv4 protocol as proposed in RFC8881bis. The new flags include NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, NOTIFY4_AUFLAG_VALID, and others that extend the functionality of the GET_DIR_DELEGATION operation. These changes are necessary to support the updated protocol specification. The patch modifies several files, including the XDR specification file and the NFSv4xdr_gen.c file, to include these new flags.
